case.title: DREXEL v. OHIO PARDON AND PAROLE COMMISSION

opinion.h: DREXEL v. OHIO PARDON AND PAROLE COMMISSION, 373 U.S. 377 (1963)
DREXEL v. OHIO PARDON AND PAROLE COMMISSION. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF OHIO. No. 975, Misc. Decided May 20, 1963.
ATWOOD'S TRANSPORT LINES, INC. v. UNITED STATES, 373 U.S. 377 (1963)
opinion.p: 373 U.S. 377 ATWOOD'S TRANSPORT LINES, INC., v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA. No. 935. Decided May 20, 1963.
James E. Wilson and Edward G. Villalon for appellant.

Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Loevinger, Lionel Kestenbaum and Robert W. Ginnane for the United States and the Interstate Commerce Commission; and S. Harrison Kahn for Alexandria, Barcroft & Washington Transit Co., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
